title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 10 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 96%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 100%, and average score is 7.89/10. Total training hours are 216 and scaled cost is 15. Overall effectiveness classification is Effective. Management interpretation: The training course 'DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring' has demonstrated high effectiveness, achieving a 100% completion and pass rate among the 10 trainees. The overall attendance rate stands at 96%, with an average score of 7.89 out of 10 and a feedback rating of 4.6 out of 5, indicating strong engagement and satisfaction.
insights: DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring has an effectiveness score of 92.28 in the selected scope.
The course has successfully met all key performance indicators, including a total of 216 training hours and a scaled cost of 15.
The effectiveness score of 92.28 reflects a well-received training experience, suggesting that the content and delivery methods are resonating well with participants.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.

To maintain and enhance the effectiveness of future training sessions, it is recommended to continue monitoring trainee feedback closely and consider implementing advanced topics or follow-up sessions to further engage participants.
Additionally, exploring opportunities for mentorship roles for high-performing trainees could foster a culture of continuous learning.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
